# Buildwise Media

> Stop losing the jobs that matter. Install the Revenue Engine that books qualified jobs on autopilot. We capture, qualify, and follow up on every lead in under three minutes — until the right ones are sitting on your calendar. AI-powered, ambition-disposed service-business owners only. Based in Atlanta, GA. Serves North America.

## About
Buildwise Media builds and installs The Buildwise Revenue Engine — an AI-powered, baseline-first lead-capture-and-qualification system for service businesses. The buyer's problem isn't lead volume; it's lead loss — leads that hit the form, sit for an hour, and call the next contractor on Google. The Revenue Engine fixes the leak: captures every form/call/DM, qualifies before the calendar, follows up under three minutes day or night, and books warm leads onto a calendar that fills itself. Three expressions of the spine: Build (we build and install the whole system), Speed (live site in a week, attribution on day one, full engine in 30 days), Verified (every claim baselined, every outcome measured, every connector stack audited weekly). Clients own everything we build. Month-to-month, no lock-in.

## Claims policy
Every claim on this site is verifiable. We publish the evidence class (Measured / Attributed / Modeled / Benchmark) and the captured baseline on every outcome. Confidence Floor is 75% — claims below that threshold do not ship. Full policy and math at https://buildwisemedia.com/math. Ask your current agency to show you theirs.

## Services

### Ascend — The Buildwise Revenue Engine (full-service)
- Total monthly: $7,000/mo
  - BWM management fee: $6,000/mo
  - Included ad spend: $1,000/mo (client funds their own ad account)
- One-time Engine Build fee: $2,500 (at signup)
- Includes: Custom website (90+ PageSpeed, AEO-structured, attribution streaming from day one), content production, paid ads management (Meta + Google), AI business tools (chatbot, phone, booking, review management), weekly connector audit, baseline-first attribution, monthly performance reviews
- Timeline: Discovery + site live (week 1) · full engine running (day 30) · first captured-baseline KPIs (day 90)
- Terms: Month-to-month. Cancel with 30 days written notice. Client owns all assets — website, ad accounts, content, automations, attribution data.

### Ascend Lite — Same-call fallback (not marketed on the website)
- Total monthly: $4,500/mo = $3,500 management + $1,000 included ad spend
- Same Engine Build ($2,500). Offered only on a discovery call when full-service isn't the right fit for the business.

## Key pages
- https://buildwisemedia.com/how-it-works — 3-phase process (discovery → install → operations)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/services/ascend — Full deliverable stack and terms
- https://buildwisemedia.com/results — Client outcomes with captured baseline + evidence class
- https://buildwisemedia.com/the-poor-four — Framework naming the four lead-loss leaks behind service-business stagnation: Lead Droughts (predictability lost), Owner Trap (your time lost), Vendor Carousel (trust lost), Attribution Blindness (leverage lost)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/math — The math of waiting: what slow follow-up costs the average service business per quarter; break-even table by trade
- https://buildwisemedia.com/why-now — The capability curve and the AI gap: why every month you wait is six months your competitor doesn't have to catch up to
- https://buildwisemedia.com/why-buildwise — System-first methodology + engineering standards
- https://buildwisemedia.com/book — 15-minute discovery call — qualification first

## Target customer
Ambition-disposed service-business owners generating $1M–$5M annual revenue in North America. Ambition-vs-fear disposition on AI is the hard filter; revenue band is the soft affordability floor. Industries: home services, trades, specialty contractors, med spas, dental, remodeling, construction. Owners looking for comfort or a savior are out of ICP — this is for operators tired of paying for leads that go cold and ready to install a system that doesn't sleep.

## We do not work with
- E-commerce or product businesses
- Pre-revenue startups without product-market fit
- Businesses looking for a "set and forget" solution with no owner involvement in approval checkpoints

## Industries served
HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Med Spas & Aesthetic Clinics, Custom Home Builders & Remodelers, Roofing, Pest Control & Wildlife, Luxury Landscaping & Hardscaping, Custom Pools & Outdoor Living, High-End Dental & Orthodontics, Concrete & Flatwork, and other service businesses operating at an installable operations scale.

## Credentials
- Founded: January 2024
- 47-point pre-ship checklist on every deploy
- Weekly automated connector audit across all active client sites (Monday 04:00 ET)
- Canonical Site Files contract (LOCKED 2026-04-20) on every BWM-built site
- Meta + Google Ads server-side conversion tracking implemented on every client
- Anchor case study: $300K to $10M, one client, first year
